Top Five (2014)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $25,317,379Details
International Box Office $684,362
Worldwide Box Office $26,001,741
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,056,398
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $559,268
Total $1,615,666
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The story of New York City comedian-turned-film star Andre Allen, whose unexpected encounter with a journalist forces him to confront the comedy career—and the past—that he’s left behind.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$6,896,593 (27.2% of total gross)
Legs:3.67 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:97.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$12,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:979 opening theaters/1,426 max. theaters, 4.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $36,853,783

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 12th, 2014 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: March 12th, 2015 (Wide) (Australia)
May 8th, 2015 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
Video Release: March 17th, 2015 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: R for strong sexual content, nudity, crude humor, language throughout and some drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2348, 11/12/2013)
Running Time: 101 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Directing Yourself, Gratuitous Cameos, Intertitle, One Day, Prologue, Screenplay Written By the Star
Geographical setting: New York
Plot point: Addiction, African Americans, Closeted Homosexual, Critic, Dysfunctional Family, False Identity, Investigative Journalist, LGBTQ+, Love Triangle, Non-Chronological, Reality TV, Rehab / Former Addict, Romance
Social setting: Bachelor Party, Movie Business, Stand-Up Comedy, Wedding Day
Subgenre: Comedy Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: IACF
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
